text.title: Security Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure applying the security-architecture methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: design-identity-and-authz
step.action: Pick IAM provider; define authz model (RBAC / ABAC); author matrix.

step.name: secrets-handling
step.action: Pick managed provider, scope per service, define rotation cadence.

step.name: threat-model-stride
step.action: Walk STRIDE per asset; map threats to controls or accepted-risk.

step.name: wire-ci-controls
step.action: Add SAST, SCA, secret scanner, IaC scanner, DAST in CI; configure severity gates.

step.name: incident-response-plan
step.action: Define detection signals, severities, paging, tabletop cadence.

step.name: publish-spec
step.action: Compose security spec; review with sec + legal.
